hero.title: Restoring Health, Renewing Hope
hero.description: One step at a time. We're transforming lives through health restoration and community care. From education in India to seniors in the USA, every donation creates real, measurable impact.

media.headline: 100% of donations fund health programs directly

cards.title: Lives Change
cards.description: Seniors get meals, students get education, health is restored.

featuredCampaign.fallbackDescription: $100 funds one student's complete education for a full year in India. This includes tuition, books, meals, and health supplies. Every donation transforms a life.
